targets.query:
from(bucket: "qoe")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.stream_id == "${stream}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "throughput_mbps")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

from(bucket: "qoe")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.stream_id == "${stream}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "frames_per_s")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> last()

panels.title: BRISQUE avg / min / max over time

panels.title: Decode errors per second
panels.description: Spikes = incomplete I-frames whose bitstream was too corrupted for avcodec. These frames emit brisque=-1.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "qoe")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "brisque_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.stream_id == "${stream}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "decode_errors_per_s")
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)

list.definition: from(bucket: "qoe") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_metrics") |> keep(columns: ["stream_id"]) |> distinct(column: "stream_id")
list.label: Stream
list.name: stream
list.query: from(bucket: "qoe") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qoe_metrics") |> keep(columns: ["stream_id"]) |> distinct(column: "stream_id")
